description: Second extension corpus (merged after dataset-v2 + dataset-extra). Adds JWT and email sources, a discriminative case (RS256 code must NOT map to the HS256 oauth-spec), cross-file source reuse (token_ttl -> oauth-spec), and two more DISTRACTOR sources (i18n, telemetry) that no span uses.

sources.content: Service tokens are signed with RS256 using a 2048-bit RSA key. The 'kid' header selects the active signing key during rotation. Every token carries iss, aud, and exp claims.
Outbound email is sent via SendGrid. The From address is no-reply@acme.com. Bounces are processed by a webhook and an address is suppressed after 3 hard bounces.
UI strings are keyed in en.json; a missing key falls back to the key name itself. Pluralization uses ICU MessageFormat with locale-specific plural rules.
Client analytics events are batched every 10 seconds and posted to the analytics endpoint. PII is stripped client-side before any event leaves the device.
